/usr/bin/c++  -fsanitize=address -g -g  -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/LRU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CacheServer.dir/src/ThreadPool.cpp.o -o CacheServer   -L/home/liuyixuan/learning/cpp/mprpc/day1/inlcude
